programme.title: Seven Worlds, One Planet
programme.desc: Isolated for millions of years, Australia has a variety of unique animals, including the most dangerous bird in the world, kangaroos, wombats, koalas and predators.

programme.title: Back to School
programme.desc: An earthy self-made man (Rodney Dangerfield) divorces his no-good wife and buys his way into his son's (Keith Gordon) college.

programme.title: Happy Gilmore
programme.desc: A powerful swing convinces a hockey player he can join the PGA Tour and win back his grandmother's repossessed house.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: Alan reluctantly agrees to a makeover after running into his ex-wife and her new beau; when the brothers go shopping, they clash over what to buy.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: The housekeeper's beautiful granddaughter comes to work with her and attracts the attention of the men; Alan tries to convince Judith that Charlie's house is good for Jake.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: Charlie sets his ailing brother up on a date, then drags him to a steam room to help him get rid of his flu symptoms.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: Charlie realizes he's broke when his credit card is declined at the grocery store. Richard Lewis guest stars.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: Against Alan's judgment, Charlie falls for a seemingly crazy woman named Frankie. Guest star: Jenna Elfman.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: Frankie tells Charlie and Alan why she and her daughter are on the run; Frankie's daughter has a crush on Jake.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: Alan offends Charlie by choosing harebrained cousins as Jake's guardians in the event of his death.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: Charlie is stunned to learn his ex-girlfriend is now a man (Chris O'Donnell).

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: Judith's sister, Liz (guest star Teri Hatcher), hits on Alan at Jake's birthday party; Evelyn prefers alcohol to cake.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: After trying a father/son talk, Alan and Judith decide to take a moody Jake to a therapist (Jane Lynch).

programme.title: Major League
programme.desc: Lackluster baseball players (Tom Berenger, Charlie Sheen, Corbin Bernsen) hear their Cleveland team's new owner is counting on them to lose.

programme.title: The Outsiders
programme.desc: In the 1960s Oklahoma a sensitive youth gets in over his head when his best friend kills a member of a rival gang.

programme.title: Stand by Me
programme.desc: A boy (Wil Wheaton) and his three buddies set out in the summer of 1959 on a hike to find a dead body.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: McCoy and Ross must negotiate with an informant to get information about a missing couple and the main suspect in the disappearance.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The death of a disabled teenage boy raises questions about whether a suspected killer was motivated by mercy or something more sinister.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Schiff's re-election may hinge on the stabbing death of a police officer; Briscoe's daughter is arrested for dealing drugs.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Detectives Briscoe and Curtis take on a double shooting case; McCoy and Ross prosecute the alleged gang rape of a girl with disabilities.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: When a well-known law professor is killed while being chased by a tabloid journalist, the victim's husband tries to keep family secrets out of the press.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Opponents of Adam Schiff question the handling of a sexual-assault case by the police and the D.A.'s office.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The investigation into a girl's death reveals secrets the adoptive family was desperately trying to hide.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Asia
programme.desc: Many passionate people are dedicated to saving the wild animals of Asia; these individuals and their ingenious solutions give hope and optimism for the future of the continent.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Asia
programme.desc: In the planet's most densely populated continent, animals live at extremely close quarters with people, from tigers making a home in town to elephants stopping traffic for food.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Asia
programme.desc: Asia is the most mountainous continent on earth; from the tropical south to its barren centre, its highest places are home to some of our planet's most remarkable wildlife.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Asia
programme.desc: Asia has the longest coastline of any continent, rich coral reefs, and never-seen-before animal behavior; exploring Asia's diverse waters.

programme.title: The Outsiders
programme.desc: In the 1960s Oklahoma a sensitive youth gets in over his head when his best friend kills a member of a rival gang.

programme.title: Stand by Me
programme.desc: A boy (Wil Wheaton) and his three buddies set out in the summer of 1959 on a hike to find a dead body.

programme.title: Young Guns
programme.desc: An English aristocrat hires Billy the Kid (Emilio Estevez) and five other outcasts to guard his New Mexico ranch.

programme.title: Days of Thunder
programme.desc: An upstart stock-car driver goes to the edge for his manager, his brain-surgeon girlfriend and himself.

programme.title: Road House
programme.desc: Hired to tame a rowdy Missouri bar, a Ph.D. bouncer (Patrick Swayze) romances a doctor (Kelly Lynch) and tames the whole town.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Detectives discover a shocking twist involving unlikely suspects when they investigate the brutal beating of a black man dumped near the highway.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A robbery/assault victim feeds the police half-truths leading to the discovery of the cold-blooded murder of a young girl.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The death of a boy from an injection of a lethal flu sends detectives Briscoe and Curtis and prosecutors McCoy and Carmichael after the murderer.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A serial killer confesses to new crimes, and McCoy and Carmichael face a moral dilemma when they learn they have the wrong man.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The death of a female embryologist at a fertility clinic leads Briscoe and Curtis on a search for a desperate killer.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The shooting death of a young escort prompts an investigation into high society in New York, while McCoy and Carmichael track down career criminals.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The murder of a corrections officer leads detectives to a women's prison where a guard was linked to an inmate Carmichael put away on drug charges.

programme.title: FOX and Friends
programme.desc: Co-hosts Steve Doocy, Ainsley Earhardt, Brian Kilmeade and Lawrence Jones highlight the latest.

programme.title: FOX and Friends
programme.desc: Co-hosts Steve Doocy, Ainsley Earhardt, Brian Kilmeade and Lawrence Jones highlight the latest.

programme.title: FOX and Friends
programme.desc: Co-hosts Steve Doocy, Ainsley Earhardt, Brian Kilmeade and Lawrence Jones highlight the latest.

programme.title: America's Newsroom
programme.desc: Bill Hemmer and Dana Perino cover current events happening around the nation and the world; guests pertinent to the news topics are interviewed, and viewer emails are also answered by the anchors and guests.

programme.title: America's Newsroom
programme.desc: Bill Hemmer and Dana Perino cover current events happening around the nation and the world; guests pertinent to the news topics are interviewed, and viewer emails are also answered by the anchors and guests.

programme.title: The Faulkner Focus
programme.desc: Emmy-winning journalist Harris Faulkner provides the latest news with insightful analysis and interviews with top newsmakers.

programme.title: Outnumbered
programme.desc: Four female panelists and one male colleague share their perspectives on the day's top news stories.

programme.title: America Reports
programme.desc: A look at the latest news and headlines with Sandra Smith and John Roberts.

programme.title: America Reports
programme.desc: A look at the latest news and headlines with Sandra Smith and John Roberts.

programme.title: The Story With Martha MacCallum
programme.desc: Martha MacCallum brings the story of the times with her tough but fair interviews and straightforward analysis;

programme.title: The Will Cain Show
programme.desc: Featuring Cain's signature podcast style and thoughtful perspective through conversations with newsmakers across politics, culture and sports.

programme.title: The Five
programme.desc: Dana Perino, Greg Gutfeld and Jesse Watters and rotating liberal co-hosts Jessica Tarlov and Harold Ford Jr. discuss and debate the hot issues across the spectrum from politics to pop culture.

programme.title: Special Report With Bret Baier
programme.desc: Former Fox News chief White House correspondent Bret Baier takes a closer look at political stories from Washington, DC.

programme.title: The Ingraham Angle
programme.desc: Laura Ingraham aims to cut through the Washington chatter to speak directly with unexpected voices and the actual people who are impacted by the news of the day.

programme.title: Jesse Watters Primetime
programme.desc: Jesse Watters speaks with newsmakers from across the U.S. to present news with a clear and direct approach.

programme.title: Hannity
programme.desc: Sean Hannity interviews political figures and newsmakers and offers his own conservative perspective on events.

programme.title: Gutfeld!
programme.desc: Greg Gutfeld looks at the news of the day through a satiric lens fused with pop culture and features his takes on the day's headlines.

programme.title: Fox News at Night
programme.desc: Hard news and analysis of compelling stories from DC and across the country; journalists provide viewers with must-see information and consequential news.

programme.title: The Five
programme.desc: Dana Perino, Greg Gutfeld and Jesse Watters and rotating liberal co-hosts Jessica Tarlov and Harold Ford Jr. discuss and debate the hot issues across the spectrum from politics to pop culture.

programme.desc: Jesse Watters speaks with newsmakers from across the U.S. to present news with a clear and direct approach.

programme.desc: Sean Hannity interviews political figures and newsmakers and offers his own conservative perspective on events.

programme.desc: Hard news and analysis of compelling stories from DC and across the country; journalists provide viewers with must-see information and consequential news.

programme.title: FOX & Friends First
programme.desc: Hosts Todd Piro and Carley Shimkus present all the headlines viewers may have missed overnight, along with a preview of upcoming news events.

programme.desc: Co-hosts Steve Doocy, Ainsley Earhardt, Brian Kilmeade and Lawrence Jones highlight the latest.

programme.title: Upheaval: The Journey of Menachem Begin
programme.desc: Imagery, rarely seen archival materials and interviews provide insight into the life and history of former Israeli Prime Minister Menachem Begin.

programme.title: First Edition
programme.desc: The host presents a round-up of the latest social, political and economic news updates and developments from across the country.

programme.title: National Update
programme.desc: Live national headlines, expert interviews and insight into the stories shaping America.

programme.title: John Bachman Now
programme.desc: John Bachman tackles big news from DC, NY and around America.

programme.title: National Desk
programme.desc: Bringing breaking news, investigative reports, and political coverage.

programme.title: Newswire
programme.desc: Up-to-the-minute news updates, in-depth analysis, exclusive interviews and a fresh perspective on the day's top stories and key developments in breaking news, politics and current events.

programme.title: Ike Wingate America
programme.desc: Ike Wingate is a straight shooter who takes the complex stories of the day and lays them out logically and sensibly, making sense of the news.

programme.title: The Todd Starnes Show
programme.desc: Todd Starnes delivers breaking news and commentary covering politics, faith, and culture.

programme.title: Ed Henry: The Briefing
programme.desc: A comprehensive update, offering a dynamic blend of breaking news, political developments and business insights.

programme.title: The Leventhal Report
programme.desc: Rick Leventhal delivers comprehensive analysis and interviews on current affairs and significant events from home and abroad.

programme.title: David Harris Jr. The Pulse
programme.desc: Hard-hitting analysis and opinion on the latest news and events delivered.

programme.title: America's Mayor Live
programme.desc: Former NY Mayor Rudy Giuliani gives insight on leadership, courage and the most pressing issues of our time.

programme.title: The Big Focus
programme.desc: John Bachman focuses on the biggest news from D.C., N.Y., and around America.

programme.title: The Freedom File: Judge Napolitano
programme.desc: Judge Napolitano provides commentary on current events, drawing on his expertise in constitutional law to protect individual freedoms.

programme.title: Newsfront
programme.desc: Government officials shield non-immigrant visa overstayers from law enforcement for political gain at the expense of American citizens.

programme.title: Ed Henry: The Briefing
programme.desc: A comprehensive update, offering a dynamic blend of breaking news, political developments and business insights.

programme.title: The Leventhal Report
programme.desc: Rick Leventhal delivers comprehensive analysis and interviews on current affairs and significant events from home and abroad.

programme.title: David Harris Jr. The Pulse
programme.desc: Hard-hitting analysis and opinion on the latest news and events delivered.

programme.title: Choose Life: It's Worth It
programme.desc: Women who made the decision to place their babies for adoption, and people adopted as infants share their compelling stories.

programme.title: Foul Play: Athletes Speak Out
programme.desc: Courageous athletes speak out against the woke mob and champion women's sports, Christianity, traditional values and politics.

programme.title: Censored! Losing Our First Freedoms
programme.desc: The influence of Big Tech, progressives and anti-American global force on open discussion, honest debate and truth in America.

programme.title: Parents Fight Back
programme.desc: As the nation is implementing new school policies, parents across the country are beginning to stand up and fight back.

programme.title: This Week on Capitol Hill
programme.desc: An inside look at decision-making in Congress.

programme.title: Newsfront
programme.desc: Russia and China combined may have twice as many nuclear weapons as the United States within a decade. The United States must modernize its aging nuclear arsenal.

programme.title: Presidents and UFOs: The Surprising Story
programme.desc: A history of UFO's and Presidents, from George Washington to Donald Trump, with expert testimony, interviews, and reports of personal encounters involving U.S. Presidents and unexplained paranormal phenomena.

programme.title: Ed Henry: The Briefing
programme.desc: A comprehensive update, offering a dynamic blend of breaking news, political developments and business insights.

programme.title: The Leventhal Report

programme.title: David Harris Jr. The Pulse
programme.desc: Hard-hitting analysis and opinion on the latest news and events delivered.

programme.title: Vision: Elon Musk's Story
programme.desc: Taking a look at the story of Elon Musk, as he continues to make advances in technology, outer space, politics and government policy.

programme.title: Wardens
programme.desc: Officers in the northern Lower Peninsula check on hunters during a highway patrol and the Acting Director of the DNR hunts for turkeys.

programme.title: Wardens
programme.desc: A minor hunts without a license during archery season and a look at planting native wildflowers to benefit a wide array of wildlife.

programme.title: Unearthed
programme.desc: Archaeologists research a fully intact 1st-century fishing boat by the Sea of Galilee.

programme.title: Unearthed
programme.desc: Excavations exposing the continuation of the Western Wall revealed unknown facts about the Temple Mount. Archeologist Dr. Dan Bahat shares the history, excavation, and controversies of these amazing tunnels.

programme.title: Biblical Prophecy: The End Times
programme.desc: Examines how world events are lining up with Christian and Jewish eschatology. Biblical experts explain how major events today warn of what is to come.

programme.title: Wake Up America Early
programme.desc: Presents news delivering key facts, expert insights, and in-depth analysis to kickstart your day.

programme.title: Wake Up America
programme.desc: Starting the day with real news and analysis.

programme.title: National Report
programme.desc: Your source for up-to-the-minute breaking news; the ideal way to stay informed with eye-opening coverage that makes sense of the stories that affect our lives every day.

programme.desc: Bianca de la Garza tackles the big news from D.C., N.Y., across America, and around the world!

programme.desc: Greta Van Susteren gives the big news from Washington, D.C., New York, across America and around the world.

programme.title: Securing America
programme.desc: Security expert Frank Gaffney and guests discuss threats facing the United States.

programme.title: Daybreak
programme.desc: Join hosts Steve and Ivie Gruber as they get your day started.

programme.title: American Sunrise
programme.desc: Morning news with the Real America's Voice team live from West Palm Beach, Florida.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Do you expect the worst or look for the good? Today, Joyce shares practical ways to develop a healthier, more positive outlook.

programme.title: Andrew Wommack: Gospel Truth
programme.desc: Andrew shares life-changing lessons we can learn from the life of David and how God looks at the heart of men.

programme.title: Turning Point With Dr. David Jeremiah
programme.desc: The city where Christ will reign during the Millennium.

programme.title: Joseph Prince
programme.desc: See Jesus in the Old Testament through types, shadows and Bible stories explained.

programme.title: Robert Jeffress
programme.desc: Advice for success in life from the book of Proverbs.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: What are you expecting from life? Today, Joyce explains how faith, gratitude and perspective can change the way you approach each day.

programme.title: Creflo Dollar
programme.desc: Dr. Creflo Dollar ministers to people from all backgrounds with hopes for change; Creflo helps viewers find ways to renew their faith, mind, and spirit; Creflo and his wife Taffi share their vision for everyone to understand God's love and promises.

programme.title: Hagee Ministries
programme.desc: The mission of John Hagee Ministries is to take the Gospel to all the world and to all generations.

programme.title: Joel Osteen
programme.desc: Joel and Victoria Osteen's message of unconditional love and unending hope reaches everyone across the world.

programme.title: Allen Jackson Ministries
programme.desc: What's the best way to prepare for the uncertain future? Trust God with our resources! Pastor Allen Jackson talks about biblical principles surrounding the money, resources, and possessions.

programme.title: Steven Furtick
programme.desc: Sometimes, even when your situation isn't getting better, you are. Stop stressing like you need to do it alone and remember that God is with you in it. He's already given you what you need - and He'll help you work it in to what you're facing.

programme.title: Kingdom Connection With Jentezen Franklin
programme.desc: What will heaven really be like?

programme.title: Robert Jeffress
programme.desc: Pathway to Victory is the broadcast ministry of Dr. Robert Jeffress and the First Baptist Church of Dallas, Texas. The bold and practical Bible teaching of Pastor Jeffress pierces the darkness with the light of God's Word.

programme.title: Winning Walk
programme.desc: The international teaching ministry of the Rev. Dr. Ed Young, senior pastor of Second Baptist Church in Houston, proclaims the truth of God's word to people throughout the world.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: What are you expecting from life? Today, Joyce explains how faith, gratitude and perspective can change the way you approach each day.

programme.title: Better Together
programme.desc: Sheila Walsh, Jackie Hill Perry, Toni Collier, Lisa Whittle and Elyse Mahan discuss how God's grace empowers believers to turn from sin and walk in the freedom found only through Jesus.

programme.title: Andrew Wommack: Gospel Truth
programme.desc: Andrew shares life-changing lessons we can learn from the life of David and how God looks at the heart of men.

programme.title: The 700 Club
programme.desc: Amazing stories of God helping people around the world.

programme.title: Turning Point With Dr. David Jeremiah
programme.desc: The city where Christ will reign during the Millennium.

programme.title: Steven Furtick
programme.desc: Sometimes, even when your situation isn't getting better, you are. Stop stressing like you need to do it alone and remember that God is with you in it. He's already given you what you need - and He'll help you work it in to what you're facing.

programme.desc: Join Pastor Greg Laurie for a time of encouragement, worship and Bible study.

programme.desc: Join Charlie Kirk as he breaks down the news, challenges the mainstream narrative and delivers commentary on faith, culture and politics; no spin, no censorship, just the truth.

programme.title: Allen Jackson NOW
programme.desc: A lifeline for a struggling and anxious nation; a guiding hand for those who are not ready to give up, and for those who want to find a way past the negativity before things get worse; searching for the wisdom embedded in a Christian World View.

programme.title: Stakelbeck Tonight
programme.desc: Host Erick Stakelbeck takes viewers around the world; from Jerusalem to London to Washington, D.C., pointing beyond with cutting-edge commentary, analysis and interviews focusing on ever-changing events and why they matter.

programme.desc: Matt and Laurie Crouch host James JB Brown.

programme.desc: Pastor Allen Jackson sits down with Matt and Laurie to discuss how believers must lead with faith every day, sharing how perseverance and courage through difficult seasons reveal God's purpose and power.

programme.desc: The mission of John Hagee Ministries is to take the Gospel to all the world and to all generations.

programme.desc: The international teaching ministry of the Rev. Dr. Ed Young, senior pastor of Second Baptist Church in Houston, proclaims the truth of God's word to people throughout the world.
